title: cardamine pratensis subsp. rivularis
intro: Cardamine pratensis subsp. rivularis, commonly known as Spring Cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. The therapeutic actions of Spring Cress include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its bioactive constituents, such as isothiocyanates and other glucosinolates.
